description_long: This is a compact, armless sofa with a simple, modern design, upholstered in a dark blue-green speckled fabric. The seat and backrest are both thick and rectangular, forming a continuous, uniform surface without visible seams or individual cushions. The sofa stands on four short, blocky legs, likely made of wood or metal, positioned at each corner for stability. The backrest is straight and high, providing ample support, and is attached directly to the seat base. There are no decorative elements, armrests, or visible buttons, giving the sofa a minimalist and utilitarian appearance. The upholstery has a subtle, mottled texture that adds visual interest while maintaining a subdued, urban-friendly look.
description: A modern, armless sofa with dark blue-green speckled upholstery, straight backrest, and four block legs. The design is minimalist and functional, with a continuous seat and backrest.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sofa's thick, straight backrest and seat, with no armrests and two visible block legs.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the wide, continuous seat and backrest, both covered in speckled fabric, and two front legs.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, highlighting the sofa's armless profile and two block legs.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the full width of the backrest, covered in the same speckled fabric, and the two rear legs.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, continuous seat and backrest cushions, both attached and uniform in size, with no visible segmentation or tufting.
attribute_armrest_style: No armrests present; the sofa has a clean, armless profile with straight sides.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, block-style legs, likely wood or metal, positioned at each corner and finished in black; legs are exposed and simple in design.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, continuous backrest attached directly to the seat, with no segmentation or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Speckled, mottled fabric in dark blue-green tones, with a subtle, uniform texture and no visible decorative stitching or patterns.
